notes: Settings now include a Changelog button with an in-game modal popup.
Settings button is now only available from the main menu (hidden during arena matches).
Combat 2x acceleration threshold moved from 10s to 15s.
Combat pacing now accelerates asynchronous gameplay actions consistently.
Fixed combat timer self-acceleration; only gameplay pacing is accelerated.
Arena dice animation flow has been tidied into DiceAnimations.ts.
Casino dice now use a jitter-based rolling animation before final faces settle.
